label: Launch
sourceNote: Archived phase sequence from legacy Artemis III lunar profile; timings are reconstructed/notional.
description: Launch from Kennedy Space Center. Vehicle: SLS + Orion.

label: Ascent staging
sourceNote: Archived phase sequence from legacy Artemis III lunar profile; timings are reconstructed/notional.
description: Booster/fairing/LAS jettison, then core stage shutdown and separation. Vehicle: SLS.

label: Temporary Earth orbit
sourceNote: Archived phase sequence from legacy Artemis III lunar profile; timings are reconstructed/notional.
description: Enter Earth orbit, perform systems checks and solar panel adjustments. Vehicle: Orion.

label: Translunar injection
sourceNote: Archived phase sequence from legacy Artemis III lunar profile; timings are reconstructed/notional.
description: Depart Earth orbit for the Moon. Vehicle: Orion / ICPS.

label: Outbound translunar cruise
sourceNote: Archived phase sequence from legacy Artemis III lunar profile; timings are reconstructed/notional.
description: Several outbound correction burns on the way to the Moon. Vehicle: Orion.

label: Outbound powered flyby
sourceNote: Archived phase sequence from legacy Artemis III lunar profile; timings are reconstructed/notional.
description: Lunar flyby maneuver near the Moon. Vehicle: Orion.

label: NRHO insertion
sourceNote: Archived phase sequence from legacy Artemis III lunar profile; timings are reconstructed/notional.
description: Insert into lunar near-rectilinear halo orbit. Vehicle: Orion.

label: Lander ready in NRHO
sourceNote: Archived phase sequence from legacy Artemis III lunar profile; timings are reconstructed/notional.
description: HLS has already reached NRHO before crew arrival in the archived concept. Vehicle: Starship HLS.

label: Dock / crew transfer
sourceNote: Archived phase sequence from legacy Artemis III lunar profile; timings are reconstructed/notional.
description: Orion docks to HLS; two crew transfer. Vehicle: Orion + HLS.

label: Descent staging
sourceNote: Archived phase sequence from legacy Artemis III lunar profile; timings are reconstructed/notional.
description: Undock, depart NRHO, and head toward low lunar orbit / descent. Vehicle: HLS.

label: Surface mission
sourceNote: Archived phase sequence from legacy Artemis III lunar profile; timings are reconstructed/notional.
description: Approx. week-long surface mission near lunar South Pole. Vehicle: HLS.

label: Orion loiter
sourceNote: Archived phase sequence from legacy Artemis III lunar profile; timings are reconstructed/notional.
description: Orion remains in NRHO for about one orbit (~6.5 days). Vehicle: Orion.

label: Ascent / rendezvous
sourceNote: Archived phase sequence from legacy Artemis III lunar profile; timings are reconstructed/notional.
description: Ascend from the surface, rendezvous, and dock back with Orion. Vehicle: HLS.

label: Post-docking loiter
sourceNote: Archived phase sequence from legacy Artemis III lunar profile; timings are reconstructed/notional.
description: Up to five days in lunar orbit preparing for return. Vehicle: Orion.

label: NRHO departure
sourceNote: Archived phase sequence from legacy Artemis III lunar profile; timings are reconstructed/notional.
description: Depart NRHO at the optimal point for Earth return. Vehicle: Orion.

label: Return powered flyby
sourceNote: Archived phase sequence from legacy Artemis III lunar profile; timings are reconstructed/notional.
description: Powered flyby near the Moon to target Earth return. Vehicle: Orion.

label: Return correction
sourceNote: Archived phase sequence from legacy Artemis III lunar profile; timings are reconstructed/notional.
description: Final return trajectory correction burn. Vehicle: Orion.

label: Service module separation
sourceNote: Archived phase sequence from legacy Artemis III lunar profile; timings are reconstructed/notional.
description: Crew module separates before atmospheric entry. Vehicle: Orion.

label: Entry and splashdown
sourceNote: Archived phase sequence from legacy Artemis III lunar profile; timings are reconstructed/notional.
description: Earth entry and Pacific splashdown. Vehicle: Orion Crew Module.
